subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Verily Bahá forbiddeth vain desires and commandeth all to turn unto the Lord of all beings, and beareth witness unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی ان البهاء ینهی عن الهوی و یامر الکل الی مالک الوری و یشهد لک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @idle fancies; lust and passion
